## The question
The scientific question, in one sentence. Domain experts answer this; engineers don't.

Which feature / decision / paper section can't move forward without a resolution.

What the code does today, even if it's a stand-in.

## Source

## What happens when resolved
Once answered, this Issue gets closed and the implementation Issue (link below if any) moves to active flight.

- Linked implementation issue: #...
- ADR to file in `docs/active/DECISIONS.md`: yes / no
